summary: The fourth day of the exam concludes with all participants splitting the points, as characters discuss Captain Kim Ja-Jin's surprising interest in Na-Yoon. Meanwhile, a creature named Evangel hatches beside Rachel and imprints on the protagonist, referring to them as "Daddy." The protagonist successfully sneaks Evangel into the dormitory while also possessing a magical "Powder of the Butterfly Seedling." Amidst these events, the protagonist senses a powerful, lingering energy, feeling as though they are destined for a future encounter.
key_moments: The fourth day of the exam concludes, and points are split among all participants.
Characters discuss Captain Kim Ja-Jin's perceived interest in Na-Yoon, who then appears.
A creature named Evangel hatches beside Rachel and adopts the protagonist as her "Daddy," leading to Evangel being snuck into the dormitory.
The protagonist possesses a magical powder and senses a strong, lingering energy, hinting at a future encounter.
